keywords: M10 galvanized bolt price, FOB China bolt price, hex bolt M10, galvanized hardware, bulk bolt price

heading.en: M10 Galvanized Bolt: Why It's a Standard Fastener

body.en: The M10 galvanized hex bolt is one of the most widely used fasteners in construction, infrastructure, and industrial applications worldwide. M10 refers to a 10mm nominal diameter thread, with standard thread pitch of 1.5mm. Hot-dip galvanization provides superior corrosion resistance through a zinc coating typically 45-85 microns thick, making these bolts ideal for outdoor and marine environments. TradeGo Fasteners manufactures M10 galvanized hex bolts to DIN 933/ISO 4017 standards, with Grade 8.8 high tensile strength as standard.

FOB China prices for M10 galvanized hex bolts vary based on quantity, specifications, and market conditions. Below are indicative prices for standard M10 x 30-50mm hot-dip galvanized hex bolts:

Small Orders (1-5 MT): $1,400-1,800 per metric ton
Medium Orders (5-20 MT): $1,200-1,500 per metric ton
Container Orders (20-26 MT): $1,050-1,250 per metric ton
Full Truck Load (26+ MT): $950-1,150 per metric ton

Prices are FOB Shanghai/Ningbo port and include standard export packaging. Contact TradeGo for exact quotes based on your specifications and quantity.

heading.en: Factors Affecting M10 Galvanized Bolt Prices

body.en:
Understanding price factors helps buyers time their purchases optimally:

1. Steel Raw Material Costs: Hot-rolled coil (HRC) prices fluctuate with global commodity markets. Q1 2026 HRC prices range $550-650/MT.

2. Zinc Coating Costs: Zinc prices on LME affect hot-dip galvanizing costs. Zinc currently trades at $2,800-3,200/MT.

3. Manufacturing Efficiency: Automated production lines offer better pricing than small-scale manufacturers.

4. Quality Standards: TradeGo's ISO 9001:2015 certified production ensures consistent quality with proper heat treatment.

5. Logistics: Port congestion and shipping rates affect total landed cost. Current ocean freight to Durban (South Africa) runs $800-1,500/20ft container.

heading.en: Standard Specifications for M10 Galvanized Bolts

body.en:
TradeGo M10 galvanized hex bolts meet or exceed these specifications:

Standard: DIN 933 / ISO 4017 (full thread)
Grade: 8.8 (tensile strength 800 N/mm²)
Material: Medium carbon steel (C 0.25-0.45%)
Surface Treatment: Hot-dip galvanized (ASTM A153 / ISO 1461)
Coating Weight: 500-600 g/m² (55-85 microns)
Mechanical Properties: Proof load 47,000 N, Tensile strength 800 N/mm²
Head Type: Hex head, across flats 17mm
Thread: M10 x 1.5 x (length varies)
Length Range: 20mm to 200mm standard

Custom specifications available for industrial applications.

Maximize value when purchasing M10 galvanized bolts:

1. Consolidate Orders: Combine multiple product types into container shipments to reduce per-unit shipping costs.

2. Standardize Specifications: Use DIN 933/ISO 4017 standards for widest supplier availability and competitive pricing.

3. Plan Ahead: Allow 15-20 days production + 25-35 days shipping for China to Africa orders.

4. Request Samples: Test quality with small sample orders before committing to bulk.

5. Verify Certification: Insist on mill test certificates and DIN 933/ISO 4017 compliance documentation.

TradeGo offers 30-day payment terms for established distributors and can arrange SGS inspection before shipment.
